name: 3d-print-posters
description: Mobile-first web app for AI-generated 3D printable poster orders.

scripts.firebase:emulators:functions: npm --workspace apps/functions run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --project dev
scripts.firebase:emulators:full: npm --workspace apps/functions run build && node scripts/firebase/check-emulator-java.mjs && firebase emulators:start --only auth,functions,firestore,storage --project dev
scripts.firebase:emulators:full:export: npm --workspace apps/functions run build && node scripts/firebase/check-emulator-java.mjs && firebase emulators:start --only auth,functions,firestore,storage --project dev --import .codex-run/firebase-emulators --export-on-exit .codex-run/firebase-emulators
scripts.meshy:exp-010-print-tools: node scripts/meshy/run-standard-figurine-experiment.mjs --workflow existing-model-print-tools --output-root .tmp/experiments/meshy/standard --experiment-slug exp-010-creative-lab-print-tools --run-folder-name exp-010-creative-lab-print-tools --provider-remesh-topology quad --provider-remesh-target-polycount 100000 --provider-remesh-formats glb,stl,3mf --skip-normalization
